data.content: Implemented overview column sizing stabilization in 88fce3f6. Changes: column width now caps at one sixth of the overview scrollport; sizing uses a separate per-tab watermark count; when visible columns exceed the tab watermark, the watermark promotes to visible + 2; when visible columns decrease, the watermark remains sticky. Added useOverviewColumnWatermark hook and focused tests for cap, pressure promotion, no-grow after decrease, and tab independence. Verification passed: targeted lint/test, browser/in-app check on localhost:4137, desktop/mobile metric harness, bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build.
